message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 80
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBorderThickness 2
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  ParticipantFontStyle plain
  GroupBorderColor black
  GroupBorderThickness 4
  GroupBackgroundColor transparent
  GroupFontSize 28
  GroupFontStyle bold
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageFontSize 28
}

participant ehr as ehr
participant attendance as attendance

group 按门店维度批量执行
ehr -> attendance : 查询员工累计考勤工时
attendance --> ehr : 返回员工累计考勤工时
end

@enduml
